text: By the fig and the olive
We have certainly created man in the best of stature;
tl: Laqad khalaqnal insaana fee ahsani taqweem

text: Then We return him to the lowest of the low,
Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds, for they will have a reward uninterrupted.
tl: Ill-lal lazeena aamanoo Wa-'amilus saalihaati; falahum ajrun ghairu mamnoon

text: So what yet causes you to deny the Recompense?
Is not Allāh the most just of judges?
